description.from:
Deals 739(1+0.3Skill Level)+355.4% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to enemies in a straight line ahead, stunning them for 1.8 sec. Deals an additional 339(1+0.3Skill Level)+185.4% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to non-hero enemies.
[Experiment Successful!]: No cooldown is incurred.
description.to: Attacks all frontal enemies in a straight line, dealing ??? P.DMG and stunning them for 3 sec. If the target is not a Hero, deals ??? additional P.DMG. [Experiment Success!] Removes Cooldown

description.from:
Deals 443(1+0.3Skill Level)+213.5% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies, inflicting them with [Explosive Material] for 7 sec, which increases Physical Damage taken by 25% and blinds them for 2.4 sec.
[Experiment Successful!]: Removes beneficial effects from enemies within range.
description.to: Deals ??? P.DMG to target and nearby enemies within range and inflict them with [Explosive Meterial] for 10 sec, causing them to take 20% increased P.DMG and additional inflicting Blind for 4 sec. [Experiment Success!] Dispels positive effects from enemies within range.

description.from:
Attaches a sticky bomb to a random enemy.
After 3 sec, the bomb explodes, dealing 1500(1+0.3Skill Level)+755.2% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies and stunning them for 1.8 sec. Enemies with [Explosive Material] take an additional 1001(1+0.3Skill Level)+477.5% of Attack Power as Physical Damage.
[Experiment Successful!]: The bomb explodes immediately upon attaching, triggering its effects.
description.to: Attaches a Glue Bomb to a random enemy that explodes in 3 sec, dealing ??? P.DMG to the target and nearby enemies, inflicting Stun for 3 sec. If the target is inflicted with [Explosive Material], deals ??? additional P.DMG. [Experiment Success!] Glue Bomb explodes immediately after attachment.

description.from:
On Normal Attack, has a 15% chance to fire a shell that deals 345(1+0.3Skill Level)+166.3% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies, stunning them for 1.2 sec.
At the end of each skill, attempts an [Experiment]. There is a 50% chance for success, which empowers the next skill. Empowered skills do not attempt an [Experiment].
description.to: Each auto attack has a 15% chance of firing a bomb that deals ??? P.DMG and stuns them for 2 sec. After each Skill use, Lakrak conducts an experiment. The experiment has a 50% success rate. Upon success, enhances the effects of the next Skill use. Experiment does not occur when Lakrak uses the enhanced Skill.

dark.from: Increases the duration of Blind by 1.2 sec.
dark.to: Blind duration is increased by 2 sec.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, and the number of bomb placements is changed to 2.
light.to: Mana cost is increased by 1, and attacks a random target 2 times.

light.from: Shell activation chance is increased by 10%, and stun duration is increased by 0.6 sec.
light.to: Activation chance is boosted by 10% and stun duration increases by 1 sec.

description.from: [Rapid Fire] Increases DMG by 50%, and recovers {0} Mana upon a Critical Hit.
description.to: [Rapid Fire] Increases DMG by 50% and restores {0} mana on critical hit

description.from: [Smoke Bomb] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases the duration of Blind by {0} sec.
description.to: [Smoke Bomb] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases blind duration by {0} sec.

description.from: [Glue Bomb] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces the Heal Rate of the hit target by {0}% for 7 sec.
description.to: [Glue Bomb] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Heal Rate of the hit target by {0}% for 7 sec.

dark.from: On [Experiment] success, increases Attack Speed by 300% and Status Ailment Accuracy by 300 for 10 sec.
dark.to: Each time Lakrak succeed an Experiment, his attack rate increase by 300 for 10 sec.

description.from:
[Experiment] success chance is increased by {0}%.
On [Experiment] success, Attack increases by {1}%, Attack Speed by {2}%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by {3}%. This effect stacks up to 4 times and cannot be dispelled.
description.to: Lakrak's chances of successful Experiment are increased by {0}%, and each successful experiment increases his ATK by {1}%, ATK Spd by {2} and damage against none-Heroes by {3}%. This effect can stack up to 4 times and is irremovable.
